sectionDescription: Optional tips that help you get better reviews, fewer issues, and more repeat customers. These are guidance, not requirements.

cards.title: Confirm arrival with one tap
cards.description: Use the "I've arrived" quick template so customers know you're there.

cards.title: Send a completion message + photos
cards.description: After finishing, send a quick message with your before/after photos attached.

cards.title: Flag issues early to avoid disputes
cards.description: If you notice something unexpected (damage, missing supplies), message the client before completing.

cards.title: Ask about focus areas before starting
cards.description: A quick "Any areas you want me to focus on?" can prevent misunderstandings.

cards.title: Send a thank-you after the job
cards.description: A simple thank-you message keeps the relationship positive and encourages reviews.
